description: Psionic testing and training. Mongoose Traveller 2e Core Rulebook, pp.176-188. Psionics is usually restricted; most human PCs cannot be tested without rare opportunity, but Zhodani, Droyne, and some other species grow up with training. Creator treats this as an opt-in step, and the resulting Psi score and talent skills are added to the character.

dm_rules.description: DM-1 per term completed before testing

telepathy.name: Telepathy
telepathy.description: Project thoughts, read surface minds, communicate over distance. Most common human talent.

clairvoyance.name: Clairvoyance
clairvoyance.description: Sense remote locations; perceive through walls; glimpse future fragments.

telekinesis.name: Telekinesis
telekinesis.description: Move objects with the mind. Damage and lift limits scale with Psi characteristic.

awareness.name: Awareness
awareness.description: Enhance the body: slow aging, heal faster, boost reflexes.

teleportation.name: Teleportation
teleportation.description: Move yourself — and eventually objects — instantly across distance. The rarest talent.

notes: In RAW, psionic testing is normally restricted (illegal in most Imperial space).
Creator exposes it as a GM-approved optional step; the character must be in the mustering-out or finalize phase.
Each talent trained costs Cr200,000 and takes 1 year (not reflected in age here for creator simplicity).
